'''Dalea Trovin''' was one of the few [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]] officers. She worked in [[Votrad]], a city on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She was responsible for seizing a huge warehouse full of [[List of phrases and slang/Legends#R|raw materials]], belonging to [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]].
